title: Determination of Operational Times
full_text:
4.3.3.6 Determination of Operational Times
Determination of Operational Times
1) Annual operational times, tday,i and tnight,i, shall be determined in accordance
with Article 4.3.2.6.

sentences.text: Annual operational times, tday,i and tnight,i, shall be determined in accordance with Article 4.3.2.6.
